para_trans: Martyr Rajguru Chowk, Madam Cama Marg,

Reference: 9. C.E.V., Government Decision No. SRV-2018 / P.S. No.159 / Ka.12D. 01/08/2019 2. Department of Water Resources Government Order No: Sankarna-2020 / (Q. 19/2020) / A (Class-II), D. 30.01.2020

GOVERNMENT ORDER: - For recommending eligible officers / staff for promotion to the post of Deputy Engineer (Construction / Machinery / Electrical & Mechanical), Senior Geo-Scientist-Group- * A, as well as Special Superintendent, Assistant Geologist, Sub-Medical Survey Officer and Scientific Officer-Wea in the Regional Establishment of the Department of Water Resources, Reference No. Considering the suggestions mentioned in the Government Decision No. 9, Reference No. The Divisional Promotion Committee has been constituted under the Government Order No. 2. Now, this committee is being reconstituted by superseding the revised committee as follows.

2. Department of General Administration. As per the provision in the Government Decision dated 19.08.2019, if the Divisional Promotion Committee does not include a member representing the Backward Classes, an officer shall be included as an invitee to represent the Backward Classes with the consent of the Chairman of the Committee.
The said Committee shall continue to exist until reconstituted or until further orders.
This Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
